Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class Investigation

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.Investigation
public class Investigation extends Object
Investigation - Contains investigation details of corresponding investigation
